free_text: Charged particle spectra generated by the interaction
of alpha-particles with 24 MeV energy with Cu-65.
English translation
The U-120 accelerator was used.
Self-supporting targets of Cu-65
of 0.56 mg/cm2 thick enriched to 98.4% were used.
Two silicon semiconductor detectors were
used. The solid angle of detection was 4*10**(- 4)sr.
Absolute cross-section error
No source of uncertainties for the graphic
bars is given
SD: REACTION code corrected in
Subents 2-5,10,11 according to MEMO CP-D/813.
SD: Small correction in SAMPLE.
For measurements of hydrogen ions surface
barrier dE detector with the thickness of 90 mu-m and
diffusion drift detector Si(Li) with the thickness of
sensitive area about 3 mm were used.
Fig.1
SF5=ICL; SF7=P/RSD in REACTION code corrected.
For measurements of hydrogen ions surface
barrier dE detector with the thickness of 90 mu-m and
diffusion drift detector Si(Li) with the thickness of
